testcase.name: getRoutsNotSellTest

Hibernate: drop table if exists ROUTE_STOP Hibernate: drop table if exists ROUTE_TOUR_GUIDE Hibernate: drop table if exists Service Hibernate: drop table if exists Stop Hibernate: drop table if exists Supplier Hibernate: drop table if exists users Hibernate: create table ItemService ( QUANTITY integer not null, PURCHASE_ID bigint not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, service_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Purchase ( TOTAL_PRICE float(23) not null, DATE datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, route_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, CODE varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Review ( RATING integer not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, purchase_id bigint not null, COMMENT varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Route ( MAX_NUMBER_USERS integer not null, PRICE float(23) not null, TOTAL_KM float(23) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, NAME varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table ROUTE_DRIVER ( driver_id bigint not null, route_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table ROUTE_STOP ( route_id bigint not null, stop_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table ROUTE_TOUR_GUIDE ( route_id bigint not null, tour_guide_id bigint not null ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Service ( PRICE float(23) not null, id bigint not null auto_increment, supplier_id bigint not null, NAME varchar(100) not null, DESCRIPTION varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Stop ( id bigint not null auto_increment, DESCRIPTION varchar(255), NAME varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table Supplier ( id bigint not null auto_increment, AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER varchar(255), BUSINESS_NAME varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table users ( ACTIVE bit not null, BIRTHDATE date, id bigint not null auto_increment, user_type varchar(31) not null, username varchar(50) not null, EDUCATION varchar(255), EMAIL varchar(255) not null, EXPEDIENT varchar(255), NAME varchar(255), PASSWORD varchar(255) not null, PHONE_NUMBER varchar(255), primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table Purchase add constraint UK_cfo4453imdo54geubg7so01v5 unique (CODE) testcase.name: getAllPurchasesOfUsernameTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select p1_0.id, p1_0.CODE, p1_0.DATE, p1_0.route_id, p1_0.TOTAL_PRICE, p1_0.user_id from Purchase p1_0 join users u1_0 on u1_0.id=p1_0.user_id where u1_0.username=? testcase.name: getRoutesWithStopTest

testcase.name: getMaxStopOfRoutesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select max((select count(1) from ROUTE_STOP s1_0 where r1_0.id=s1_0.route_id)) from Route r1_0

testcase.name: getTopNSuppliersInPurchasesTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s2_0.id, s2_0.AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER, s2_0.BUSINESS_NAME from ItemService is1_0 join Service s1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id join Supplier s2_0 on s2_0.id=s1_0.supplier_id group by s2_0.id order by count(is1_0.id) desc limit ? testcase.name: getUserSpendingMoreThanTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select distinct u1_0.id, u1_0.user_type, u1_0.ACTIVE, u1_0.BIRTHDATE, u1_0.EMAIL, u1_0.NAME, u1_0.PASSWORD, u1_0.PHONE_NUMBER, u1_0.username, u1_0.EXPEDIENT, u1_0.EDUCATION from users u1_0 join Purchase pl1_0 on u1_0.id=pl1_0.user_id where pl1_0.TOTAL_PRICE>=? testcase.name: getMostDemandedServiceTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.DESCRIPTION, s1_0.NAME, s1_0.PRICE, s1_0.supplier_id from ItemService is1_0 join Service s1_0 on s1_0.id=is1_0.service_id group by s1_0.id order by sum(is1_0.QUANTITY) desc limit ?

testcase.name: getTourGuidesWithRating1Test
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select distinct tgu1_0.id, tgu1_0.ACTIVE, tgu1_0.BIRTHDATE, tgu1_0.EMAIL, tgu1_0.NAME, tgu1_0.PASSWORD, tgu1_0.PHONE_NUMBER, tgu1_0.username, tgu1_0.EDUCATION from users tgu1_0 join ROUTE_TOUR_GUIDE r1_0 on tgu1_0.id=r1_0.tour_guide_id join Route r1_1 on r1_1.id=r1_0.route_id, Purchase p1_0 join Review r3_0 on p1_0.id=r3_0.purchase_id where p1_0.route_id=r1_1.id and r3_0.RATING=1 and tgu1_0.user_type='GUIDE' Hibernate: select r1_0.tour_guide_id, r1_1.id, r1_1.MAX_NUMBER_USERS, r1_1.NAME, r1_1.PRICE, r1_1.TOTAL_KM from ROUTE_TOUR_GUIDE r1_0 join Route r1_1 on r1_1.id=r1_0.route_id where r1_0.tour_guide_id=? testcase.name: getTop3RoutesWithMaxRatingTest
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select r1_0.id, r1_0.MAX_NUMBER_USERS, r1_0.NAME, r1_0.PRICE, r1_0.TOTAL_KM from Purchase p1_0 join Route r1_0 on r1_0.id=p1_0.route_id join Review r2_0 on p1_0.id=r2_0.purchase_id where r2_0.id is not null group by r1_0.id order by avg(r2_0.RATING) desc limit ? Hibernate: select s1_0.route_id, s1_1.id, s1_1.DESCRIPTION, s1_1.NAME from ROUTE_STOP s1_0 join Stop s1_1 on s1_1.id=s1_0.stop_id where s1_0.route_id=?
